title: Chart & Manifest Backfill: Compliance
intent: Ensure 23_compliance/ has complete chart.yaml (WAS) and manifest.yaml (WIE) for all shards, contracts, and implementations. Compliance policies, OPA rules, and regulatory checks.
acceptance_checks: chart.yaml exists and is fully populated in 23_compliance/
manifest.yaml exists and is fully populated in 23_compliance/
All module references resolve to existing paths
All local gates (Policy, SoT, QA) pass
No new files created outside of scope_paths_allow
SoT scorecard shows PASS for all defined rules
